title: Accounting Mcp
text:
<details>
<summary>Deployment and admin notes</summary>

The implementation lives in:

- [`nrp_accounting_pipeline/mcp_server.py`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/nrp_accounting_pipeline/mcp_server.py)
- [`nrp_accounting_pipeline/accounting_queries.py`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/nrp_accounting_pipeline/accounting_queries.py)
- [`README.md`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/README.md)

Kubernetes manifests live under [`k8s/base`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/tree/main/k8s/base), including:

- [`deployment-mcp.yaml`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/k8s/base/deployment-mcp.yaml)
- [`deployment-openapi.yaml`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/k8s/base/deployment-openapi.yaml)
- [`service-mcp.yaml`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/k8s/base/service-mcp.yaml)
- [`service-openapi.yaml`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/k8s/base/service-openapi.yaml)
- [`ingress-mcp.yaml`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/k8s/base/ingress-mcp.yaml)
- [`configmap.yaml`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/k8s/base/configmap.yaml)
- [`secret.yaml`](https://github.com/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse/blob/main/k8s/base/secret.yaml)

Deployment shape:

- `Deployment/nrp-accounting-mcp` runs the native FastMCP HTTP server on port `8000`.
- `Deployment/nrp-accounting-openapi` runs `mcpo` as an MCP-to-OpenAPI bridge on port `8000`.
- Both are exposed through HAProxy ingress on `nrp-accounting-mcp.nrp-nautilus.io`.
- Ingress routes `/` to the native MCP service and `/openapi` to the OpenAPI bridge service.
- TLS is enabled for the ingress host.

Container and runtime details:

- Image: `ghcr.io/djw8605/nrp-clickhouse:latest`
- `imagePullPolicy: Always` is set to avoid stale cached images when using `latest`.
- The OpenAPI bridge is launched with:
